provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female in her 30s with a shaved head and a crude faction brand burned into her forearm, wearing mismatched salvaged armor pieces strapped over a torn thermal undersuit, one shoulder plate clearly cut from ship hull plating and welded to a leather strap, a Compact-issue sidearm with the serial number filed off holstered in a handmade kydex holster, boots from two different pairs one black one brown, rust and ash color palette, she has chosen a side and the brand proves it
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Shaved head, rust-orange salvaged armor over black undersuit, ship interior. Faction brand implied. Mismatched armor pieces nail the Sable Reach salvage aesthetic.
